subject: [COMMON] Use deployment for postgresql
commit_message:
[COMMON] Use deployment for postgresql

Instead of statefulset + inner work in the container, use deployments in
order to be more reliable

Change-Id: Icf4fe1303ae3489c822558e28bb08b69af2d4970
Issue-ID: OOM-2234
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>

Patch Set 4:

Would let OOM experts comment on template changes but the DCAE transition looks okay to me. Is there a way to check Dashboard logs to confirm PG connection was successful on new updates (orange lab test link is not active, possibly test need to be re-triggered)?

Patch Set 4:

Morgan did a "clean up" on orange link so I can redeploy but we only retrieve logs from faulty pods so we wouldn't have it :-/
I can deploy on one ONAP and show the log if you want

yes, that will help... with windriver down, I don't have an env to validate this change currently.
